default_image.description: Default Docker image used for new project containers.

git.description: Git configuration including auth, user identity, and GPG signing.

auth.description: SSH authentication settings for Git operations.

password.description: Password or PAT for Git HTTP authentication.

credentials.description: Host-keyed username/password credentials for Git HTTP authentication.

ssh_key.description: Inline SSH private key for Git authentication.

ssh_key_path.description: Container path where the SSH private key is written.

key_id.description: GPG key ID used for commit signing.

passphrase.description: Passphrase for the GPG private key.

private_key.description: Inline GPG private key for signing commits.

hosts.description: Custom host entries added to container /etc/hosts.

listen_addr.description: Address and port for the HTTP server to listen on (e.g., :8080).

mounts.description: Additional host paths to mount into containers.

read_only.description: Whether the mount is read-only inside the container.

source.description: Absolute or relative host path to mount.

target.description: Path inside the container where the source is mounted.

ssh_public_key.description: Public SSH key injected into containers for coder access.
